title: Intex Deluxe Childs Inflatable Swimming Arm Bands. Ages 3-12 Years
features: Age: 3-6 years old 23cm x 15cm Body weight: 18 to 30 kg.
Each armband has 2 air chambers for added security and a flat inner panel for comfort.
Warning: Does not protect against drowning. Use under the constant supervision of an adult. Sold with money back guarantee if you are not completely satisfied.
description: Intex Deluxe Inflatable Arm Bands. Available in 2 sizes - Age 3 - 6 Years. 23cm x 15cm (9" x 6"). (Body weight 18 - 30kgs). Age 6 - 12 Years. 30cm x 15cm (12" x 6"). (Body weight 30 - 60 Kgs). Please select the size you would like from the drop down box. Each arm band has 2 air chambers for added safety and have a flat inner panel for extra comfort. Warning. Will not protect against drowning. To be used under constant adult supervision. Sold with money back guarantee if not completely satisfied.
